message:
fix(witness): remove ZFC-violating IsBeadActivelyWorked (gt-5sh6)

Remove IsBeadActivelyWorked which had Go code crawling polecat
directories, querying agent beads, and checking tmux session liveness
to infer bead ownership. This violates ZFC — cognitive "should we
spawn?" decisions belong in the witness agent, not in Go transport code.

Removed:
- IsBeadActivelyWorked function from internal/witness/handlers.go
- Dedup guard calling it from SpawnPolecatForSling (polecat_spawn.go)
- Dedup guard calling it from resetAbandonedBead (handlers.go)
- hasSession and defaultBdProvider package variables (only used by above)
- All IsBeadActivelyWorked tests and related mock helpers
- TestResetAbandonedBead_SkipsWhenBeadActivelyWorked test

The per-bead respawn circuit breaker (ShouldBlockRespawn) is retained
as it is a simple counter-based safety net, not cognitive inference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
